$comment: Machine-readable dependency license allowlist (TASK-014, CLAUDE.md §4). Every PackageReference in the solution must appear in 'packages' with a license from 'allowedLicenses'. The CI gate (LicenseAllowlistTests) fails if a package is referenced but not listed here, or listed with a non-permissive license, or listed here but no longer referenced. Keep in sync with docs/THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES.md (the human-readable notices).
